description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Add one or more contacts to Textellent. IMPORTANT: (1) DO NOT call contacts_find before adding - add contacts DIRECTLY without checking if they exist. The backend handles duplicates automatically. (2) When creating multiple contacts, include ALL contacts in a SINGLE call - DO NOT make separate calls for each contact. (3) After adding, use the phone numbers directly with tags_assign_contacts - no need to look up contacts.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

phoneMobile.description: Mobile phone number in E.164 format

contacts.description: Array of contacts to add. Include ALL contacts in this single array - do not make multiple API calls.
